author: Tanush1912
title: RecurLoRA v2: Pass Index Embeddings + Low-Rank Adapters on SP8192 Depth Recurrence
base_techniques: SP8192, 3-layer depth recurrence, parallel residuals, SDClip, MuonEq-R, QK-Gain 5.25, score-first TTT
novel_contribution: Pass index embeddings (Universal Transformer-inspired, 3072 params) + rank-2 LoRA on attention projections (21507 params) for per-pass specialization in recurrent layers. Total overhead: 48KB (0.3% of 16MB budget)

results.note: Awaiting compute. Will update with 3-seed results.
